MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. DAVID PINCH OF SEVERSON & WERSON, TEL. NO. (949) 442-7110 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF GMAC LLC;
ATTY. ROBERT G. PADRICK, TEL. NO. (650) 320-7620 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY LAMONT JOHNSON.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT LAMONT JOHNSON'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS; SETTING ASIDE AND VACATING THE JUNE 7, 2007 ORDER OF JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT AND FOR LEAVE TO DEFEND THE ACTION AND FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINT- THE COURT VACATED THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, TRANSFERRED VENUE TO ALAMEDA COUNTY INCLUDING LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT CAN FILE APPROPRIATE PLEADINGS AND LITIGATION IN ALAMEDA COUNTY. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR#: 8189 =301/PJB/LB

Off Calendar May-30-2007 Continued To Jul-20-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jun-07-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
David Pinch, Esq. for Plaintiff: General Motors Acceptance Corp., a Delaware Corp.
Order waiving live testimony in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Lamont Johnson as follows:
Damages $65,145.69
Prejudgment Interest $10,717.16
Attorney's Fees $500.00
Waived Costs, for a total of $76,362.85
Judgment signed in open court.
